title: Pebble's Bookerino
description:
Markdown + Minimessage book maker for Minecraft Fabric!
Generate server-side books for your server. Guidebooks or whatever you can think of.
body:
Inspired by [InfoBook](https://modrinth.com/mod/infobook) mod.

This is a book creator mod that runs server-side on Fabric and uses a mixture of Markdown and MiniMessages. You can run visit [MiniMessages Formatter](https://webui.advntr.dev/) to write out formats. Book configs has to be placed in `/config/pebbles-bookerino` ### Commands - `/book reload`: OP command to reload book config. - `/book open `: Open book with the same file name. ### Example config generated: ```md This is page 1 red! This is page 2 Two line breaks signify a new page Go to the next page to see the formatting supported. italic bold underline strikethrough
link command color Use formatter [here]! ```
